name: idds-doma
documentation:
idds-doma
====

idds-doma subpackage is for DOMA hep specific functions and plugins.
With it, iDDS can support DOMA LSST workflows.

methods.name: lib.idds.doma.workflow.domapandawork.DomaPanDAWork.get_new_input_output_maps
documentation:
\* Function called by Transformer agent.
New inputs which are not yet mapped to outputs.

```
param mapped_input_output_maps

Inputs that are already mapped.
```

methods.name: lib.idds.doma.workflow.domapandawork.DomaPanDAWork.get_processing
documentation:
*** Function called by Transformer agent.

If there is already an active processing for this work, will do nothing.
If there is no active processings, create_processing will be called.
